title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - ai agent
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training program for the AI Agent & LLM Application Development course has achieved a high completion rate of 100% and a solid attendance rate of 90.4%. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk due to the presence of at least one trainee who requires additional support, as indicated by the norm flags.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has an effectiveness score of 89.47 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.
The course had a total of 13 trainees, with a pass rate of 92.3% and an average score of 7.88 out of 10.
Feedback from participants was positive, with an average rating of 4.73 out of 5.
Despite these strengths, the effectiveness score of 89.47 suggests that there are areas for improvement, particularly in supporting at-risk trainees.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, a review of the course content may be beneficial to ensure it meets the diverse needs of all trainees.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.

approval.note: L&D Manager requested to send the AI Agent draft report to BOD. Evidence Gate rechecked: PASS; ready for human review/finalization workflow.
